additional_rules.description: Celebrity Forgivable Loan Program (FLP) — $15,000 silent subordinate lien at 0% interest, fully forgivable over a 5-year retention period. CRA-based program targeting underserved borrowers.
additional_rules.forgiveness: 100% forgiven over 5-year retention period (20% forgiven per year)
additional_rules.max_cltv: 105% unless FCB primary program has a stricter CLTV cap
additional_rules.primary_loan_types: FCB Conforming, Community Opportunity, or FHA
additional_rules.no_current_property: Borrower may NOT hold ownership interest in another property at closing
additional_rules.income_limit_80_mfi: LMI borrower path: borrower income ≤80% MFI — no MMCT/LMIT location requirement (county eligibility only)
additional_rules.income_limit_150_mfi: Standard path: borrower income ≤150% MFI — property must be in MMCT (minority >50%) or LMIT
additional_rules.income_limit_200_mfi: First generation homebuyer path: ≤200% MFI — property must be in MMCT or LMIT; borrower has not owned a home in last 3 years AND parent(s) never owned OR was in foster care
additional_rules.retention_period: Property must remain owner-occupied for 5 years; selling, transferring ownership, or cash-out refi before maturity triggers pro-rated repayment
additional_rules.funds_use: Down payment, closing costs, pre-paid taxes and insurance, permanent interest rate buydown, agent commission
additional_rules.not_for_reserves: FLP funds may NOT be used to meet reserve requirements for the primary loan

general_notes: GMCC Celebrity Forgivable Loan Program provides a $15,000 silent subordinate lien at 0% interest, fully forgivable over 5 years (20%/year).
CRA-based program available in specific counties in CA, MA, GA, NC, and SC.
Three income paths: (1) LMI borrower ≤80% MFI — county eligibility only, no tract requirement; (2) ≤150% MFI — must be in MMCT or LMIT; (3) First gen homebuyer ≤200% MFI — must be in MMCT or LMIT.
Standard matching check uses MMCT or LMI tract requirement (150% MFI path). LMI borrower path (80% MFI) waives tract requirement but requires income verification at underwriting.
Purchase transactions only. Owner-occupied primary residence only.
Borrower cannot own any other property at closing.
Min LTV 80%. Max CLTV 105% (or lower if primary program requires it).
Compatible with FCB Conforming, Community Opportunity, and FHA primary loans.
Property must remain owner-occupied for 5 years or pro-rated repayment is required.
FLP funds cannot be used to satisfy reserve requirements for the primary loan.
